onboarding.title: Welcome to SOS Location
onboarding.subtitle: To provide the best experience, please tell us who you are:

visitor.title: Visitor
visitor.description: I want to view the map and receive alerts about risks in my area.

volunteer.title: Volunteer
volunteer.description: I want to help in rescue or support operations.

government_rescue.title: Government / Rescue
government_rescue.description: I am part of an official response team or government agency.
